description: OpenAI Responses streaming with a provider-triggered local_shell tool call (client-executed). Used to validate canonical v3 parts encoding and tool-call mapping.

source.notes: We replay the `.chunks.txt` fixture via FakeOpenAIClient and assert the parsed canonical parts JSONL.

notes: This golden is derived from llm_dart parsing of the vendored AI SDK fixture, not directly copied from upstream.
Provider-only fields may appear under providerMetadata or raw parts.
